This particular UnifiedSensorTestApp.apk was compiled using the below snapshot/commit message
and placing it here as a prebuilt application.

commit a8818f57c4ca9d9ad2ba68968360b11b8390daeb
Author: Vivek Arugula <varugula@qti.qualcomm.com>
Date:   Wed Apr 9 14:53:36 2025 +0530

    sensors: Add foreground service type in USTA

        As per API level 36, forground service type is required
        for the given apk to launch via command line.

    Change-Id: Ib4b39a434455927457d36d143d9bf5d400f3475f
